source_snapshots.title: Busting ASML myths
source_snapshots.evidence_scope: ASML lithography systems used by named chipmakers
source_snapshots.expected_entities_or_stages: ASML; TSMC; Intel; Samsung; DUV; EUV; lithography; equipment
source_snapshots.notes: ASML official story identifies TSMC among customers using ASML DUV and EUV lithography systems; use as equipment-provider candidate evidence.

relationship_candidates.locator: SEC NVIDIA Form 10-K FY2026, Manufacturing section
relationship_candidates.support_excerpt: NVIDIA says it utilizes foundries such as TSMC to produce semiconductor wafers.

structured_fact.direction_note: The source states TSMC is a foundry used by NVIDIA; graph traversal may show NVIDIA -> TSMC as a reverse edge.
structured_fact.publication_blocker: requires independent source count >= 2 or human review override

relationship_candidates.locator: ASML official story, Busting ASML myths
